deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ "${SERVICE_ROLE:-api}" = "worker" ]; then celery -A celery_app.celery worker --beat --loglevel=${CELERY_LOG_LEVEL:-info} --concurrency=${CELERY_CONCURRENCY:-2}; else gunicorn run:app --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-5001} --workers ${WEB_CONCURRENCY:-2} --threads ${GUNICORN_THREADS:-4} --timeout ${GUNICORN_TIMEOUT:-120}; fi'
